title: 01 Mex
zine-seo-title: 01 Mex - A Winter in Mexico Through Street Photography by Luc Rousseau
zine-seo-description: Explore “01 Mex,” a zine by Luc Rousseau capturing the essence of Mexico during his six-month stay in the winter of 2022/2023. Featuring a curated selection of street photographs from Mexico City, Querétaro, San Miguel de Allende, Taxco, and more. Discover the vibrant culture and unique moments through Luc’s lens.
content:
01 Mex

During the winter of 2022/2023, I had the privilege of living in Mexico for six wonderful months. While I mainly stayed in Mexico City, I also took short trips to Querétaro, San Miguel de Allende, Taxco, and a few other places.

In this zine, I’ve curated a selection of street photographs that I love and that complement each other well. To see more images from this series, you can visit the gallery on my website.
